Item a.

\(f_{1}+f_{2} \in \cR(\alpha)\) and \(c f_{1} \in \cR(\alpha)\) on \([a, b]\) for any scalar \(c\text{,}\) and
\begin{align*} \int_{a}^{b} (f_{1}+f_{2})\, d\alpha \amp= \int_{a}^{b} f_{1} d\alpha +\int_{a}^{b} f_{2}\, d\alpha\\ \int_{a}^{b}c f_{1} d\alpha \amp= c \int_{a}^{b} f_{1} d\alpha. \end{align*}
in-context
